agent_definition.goal: Continuously monitor, analyze, and report on potential security threats and vulnerabilities across designated systems and public sources, escalating only when human-defined thresholds are met.
agent_definition.description: High-autonomy Grok-based agent for proactive security intelligence gathering and analysis.

human_oversight.how_oversight_works: Agent operates autonomously within defined boundaries. Daily summary report sent to security team. Any action that could impact production systems or external notifications requires explicit human approval. Weekly strategic review meeting with full reasoning traces. Override via emergency kill switch available 24/7.
human_oversight.notification_requirements: Daily digest + immediate alert on high-severity findings
human_oversight.override_mechanism: Emergency kill switch + session termination command
human_oversight.escalation_path: Immediate human escalation for any action outside predefined risk thresholds

ASI01_Agent_Goal_Hijack.implementation_details: Goal vector embedding comparison on every planning step

ASI02_Tool_Misuse_Exploitation.mitigation_strategy: Strict tool scoping and output sanitization
ASI02_Tool_Misuse_Exploitation.implementation_details: All tool outputs validated before processing

ASI08_Cascading_Failures.mitigation_strategy: Circuit breaker pattern on high-impact actions
ASI08_Cascading_Failures.implementation_details: Automatic pause if multiple high-risk findings in short time window

ASI10_Rogue_Agents.implementation_details: Anomaly detection on deviation from historical behavior

risk_treatment_plan.current_status_2026: Partially mitigated with circuit breakers. Residual risk medium-high due to Principal autonomy level. Strategy: enhance anomaly detection in Q2 2026 and conduct red-team exercise.

iso_42001_operation.8_1_operational_planning_and_control: Lifecycle managed through persistent mode with defined boundaries and weekly reviews.
iso_42001_operation.8_2_ai_risk_assessment: Ongoing via OWASP mitigations and risk treatment plan updates.
iso_42001_operation.8_3_ai_risk_treatment: Documented in risk_treatment_plan with clear owners and review dates.
iso_42001_operation.8_4_ai_system_impact_assessment: High risk tier acknowledged; human oversight strengthened to compensate.

compliance.eu_ai_act_conformity: High-risk obligations partially addressed via enhanced human oversight and documentation
